title: Apache Trino
excerpt: description: Connect Apache Trino to R2 Data Catalog using the Iceberg REST catalog connector. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Below is an example of using [Apache Trino ↗](https://trino.io/) to connect to R2 Data Catalog. For more information on connecting to R2 Data Catalog with Trino, refer to [Trino documentation ↗](https://trino.io/docs/current/connector/iceberg.html). * Sign up for a [Cloudflare account ↗](https://dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up/workers-and-pages).
